jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Voltas - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Voltas are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Voltas:
Voltas is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voltas!
